metadata.title: Boris Karabut — Frontend developer
metadata.description: Frontend freelancer: responsive web dev, full project delivery. Browse portfolio →

greetings.title: Boris Karabut
greetings.description: who works across the stack to deliver fast and beautiful websites and web apps that user will love.

about.title: I make beautiful and fast UI's
about.paragraphs: ["My passion is to create modern and fast products that promote business growth. I like to contribute to their improvement so that both the business and the end user are satisfied with the result.","From writing my first lines of code back in late 2021 to this point I have been constantly improving my development and architecture skills, improving the final product in the form of an UI/UX as I work and solving complicated tasks that become more complex and complicated over time to ensure growth in my field.","Each task is unique, so I learn and develop in each of them in order not only to give my best, but also to offer solutions that improve the final product."]

results: Launched the Startup Cycle project, which got into the Skolkovo startup pre-accelerator.
Developed the service from scratch: I designed the architecture, I chose the technology stack.
Optimized application performance: reduced loading time, improved interface responsiveness.
Covered the code with unit tests (Jest, React Testing Library), increasing the stability of the product.
Participated in the design of new functionality: offered ideas, discussed UX / UI with the team.
Launched a website of the most popular cybersecurity competition in the Russian Federation (CTF Cup)
Launched a website for the sale of merch for participants of CTF competitions and events.
Migrated one of the projects from Vue to React.
Close interacted with all team members (from the designer to the information security specialist).

workplaces.occupation: Development of web and multimedia applications
workplaces.companyName: College of Computer Science and Programming of the Financial University
results: The foundation laid during my studies allowed me to form a systematic mindset and master the full cycle of creating modern web applications.
Graduated with the highest score and the best graduation project of the course.
Became the head of the frontend direction of the student IT community

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: ["A project with 167+ free developer tools: formatters, converters, validators, cheatsheets for Git, HTTP, Regex, and guides on databases and backend. No registration or payment, all in the browser.","A platform for startup investments: users review project achievements via dashboards and graphs, invest funds, or create their own startup, publishing its progress to attract investments.","A site with complete information for Helldivers 2 players: equipment and weapon stats, the Stratagem Hero mini-game, and a galactic war global map with live event progress.","The site contained event rules, format specifics, required documents, a registration form, and a live stream from the competition.","A platform where CTF community members can buy merchandise with points earned through successful competition results or community activities.","The website of the student IT community at KIPFIN College and Financial University: structure, achievements, rules, and documentation including the official decree establishing the community."]
projects.linkTooltip: The site is no longer hosted

contacts.title: Get in touch
contacts.connectInfoDescription: I'm currently open to new opportunities. Whether you have a question, a project idea, or just want to say hi — feel free to reach out!
contacts.pointsText: ["Available for freelance & full-time roles","Usually responds within 24 hours","Russia, Moscow"]
